uses: lightning caster builds (Lightning/Chain Lightning Sorceress, Javazon, Lightning Trap Assassin)
demand_drivers: lightning Sorceress is a popular build
javazon is a top-tier farming build
demand spikes when lightning builds are meta
supply_notes: dropped by Mephisto, Diablo, Baal, and other high-level area monsters
ethereal Griffon's is less desired (no repair, used on mercenary only)

common_quote_units: Jah Rune or Ber Rune (good rolls)
important_rolls_or_variants: -15% to -20% enemy lightning resistance (most important stat)
segment_sensitivity: ladder vs non-ladder: significant price difference
early ladder: very expensive; declines over time
known_model_risks: price varies significantly by lightning resist roll
Traderie may or may not expose roll data
ethereal Griffon's trades at a fraction of non-eth
lightning facet socketing changes value further

traderie.notes: Needs evaluation: does Traderie expose enemy lightning resist roll in listing data?

reddit.notes: Use for demand, sentiment, confusion points, source discovery, and item-profile updates.

d2jsp.notes: Active trading on d2jsp with per-roll pricing.

rmt_sites.notes: External cash-market signal only. Do not present as a recommendation to buy or sell.

research_notes.note: Initial draft profile. Griffon's is a high-value unique with critical roll variance. Requires roll-aware modeling for useful pricing.

open_questions: Can enemy lightning resist roll be extracted from Traderie listing data?
Should Griffon's get per-roll pricing or a blended estimate with variance warning?
Is the lightning Sorceress currently meta for the active ladder?
